text: BREAKING: Large Russian armoured column crossing into Zaporizhzhia oblast. Ukrainian forces report contact.
Pentagon confirms additional Patriot air-defence systems dispatched to Kyiv following overnight drone barrage.
Russian MoD: 'Routine combat training exercise' concluded successfully near Kherson. All objectives met.
IDF strikes Hezbollah command node in Beirut southern suburb. Casualty figures unconfirmed.
Gaza ceasefire talks collapse in Cairo. Hamas delegation walks out over hostage clause dispute.
PLA Navy conducts live-fire drill in Taiwan Strait, 40 km from median line. Taiwan scrambles F-16s.
North Korea fires two ballistic missiles into the East Sea. Tokyo issues J-Alert for Hokkaido.
Massive cyberattack hits Ukrainian power grid. Ukrenergo reports partial outages across Kharkiv region.
UN Security Council emergency session on Gaza opens. US expected to veto draft ceasefire resolution.
Iran announces 60% uranium enrichment milestone at Fordow facility. IAEA inspectors denied access.
Houthi anti-ship missile strikes cargo vessel in Red Sea, 90 km south of Aden. Crew evacuated.
Belarus deploys additional S-400 batteries to border with Poland following NATO exercise Steadfast Dart.
Moscow warns of 'proportional response' after Kyiv strike on Belgorod oil depot with ATACMS.
NATO Secretary-General convenes Article 4 consultation following missile splashdown near Polish border.
Satellite imagery confirms new Chinese military base construction on Fiery Cross Reef, South China Sea.
Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant external power restored after 18-hour outage. IAEA monitoring continues.
Sudan RSF forces seize El Fasher airport. UNHCR warns of impending humanitarian catastrophe in Darfur.
India deploys BrahMos missile regiment to Arunachal Pradesh border. China calls move 'destabilising'.
Kyiv reports another overnight Shahed-136 swarm: 34 of 41 drones shot down. Residential district hit.
Wagner Group rebrands as 'Africa Corps'. Deployment to Niger confirmed by Niamey junta spokesman.
